zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Woodward於大約1090年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Henry Woodward48歲，母親Alice Wheaten35歲。她於1118年4月24日與Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1165年4月14日在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Woodward于大约1090年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Henry Woodward48岁，母亲Alice Wheaten35岁。她于1118年4月24日与Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1165年4月14日在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯享年76岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: Woodward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a forester employed to look after the trees and game in a forest, Middle English woodward (from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + weard ‘guardian, protector’).

History: Henry Woodward emigrated from England in 1635 and settled first in Dorchester, MA, and subsequently in Northampton, MA. He had many prominent descendants. Another Henry Woodward, born c. 1646 in the British West Indies, was the first English settler in SC (1664).

variants.name: Woodard
meanings: from the Norman Old French personal name Odard, Udard, Middle English Wodard, Wudard. It derives from the ancient Germanic name Authard, Othard, Odard, composed of the elements aud- ‘riches' + hard- ‘hard, bold’.
occupational name from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + herde ‘herd’ (Old English wudu + hierde), for a person who tended animals pastured in woodland.

variants.name: Woodworth
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Woodward or Wadworth, the latter being a habitational name from Wadworth in Yorkshire, which is derived from the Old English personal name Wada, Wadda + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Woodman
meanings: occupational name for a woodcutter or a forester (compare Woodward ), from Middle English wodeman ‘woodman’. In some instances this may be a variant of Wadman .
from the Middle English personal name Wudemann (Old English Wuduman, from wudu ‘wood’ + mann ‘man’).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Woodward was born about 1090, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Henry Woodward, was 48 and her mother, Alice Wheaten, was 35. She married Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom on 24 April 1118, in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 14 April 1165, in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Woodward est née environ 1090, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Henry Woodward, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Alice Wheaten, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom le 24 avril 1118, à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 14 avril 1165, à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Woodward um 1090 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Woodward 48 und ihre Mutter Alice Wheaten 35. Sie hat am 24. April 1118 in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 14. April 1165 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England und wurde in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Woodward è nata il circa 1090 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Henry Woodward, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Alice Wheaten, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom il 24 aprile 1118, nel Lathom St James, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 14 aprile 1165, nel Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Woodwardが約1090年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry Woodwardは48歳，母Alice Wheatenは35歳であった。1118年4月24日にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスでHenry FitzSiward Lord of Lathomと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1165年4月14日にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスで76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Woodward(이)가 대략 1090년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Woodward(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Wheaten(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1118년 4월 24일 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에서 Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1165년 4월 14일 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Woodward nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Woodward, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Alice Wheaten, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom em 24 de abril de 1118, em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 14 de abril de 1165, em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Woodward родилась около 1090 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Woodward было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Wheaten, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom 24 апреля 1118 г. в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 14 апреля 1165 г. в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Woodward nació aproximadamente 1090, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Woodward, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Alice Wheaten, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom el 24 de abril de 1118, en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 14 de abril de 1165, en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
